scripts.check:build:ci: npm ci --no-audit --no-fund && npm run prebuild && next build --webpack
scripts.check:runtime:simulation: eslint -c eslint.runtime.config.mjs src/app/simulation/page.js src/app/simulation/tacticalSkillTable.js src/app/simulation/_lib/**/*.js src/app/simulation/_components/**/*.js
scripts.check:runtime:utils: eslint -c eslint.runtime.config.mjs src/utils/battleLogic.js src/utils/equipmentCatalog.js src/utils/erMeta.js src/utils/itemLogic.js src/utils/tacticalSkillCatalog.js
scripts.check:runtime:sweep: npm run check:runtime:simulation && npm run check:runtime:utils
scripts.check:runtime:full: npm run check:runtime:sweep && npm run build
